d - 
01011010 01011010 01011010
90 90 90

01011111 11111111 01110010
95 255 114
c - 
00100111 11110111 00100010
39 247 34
s - 
01011010 01011010 01011010
90 90 90



params:
the value (starting address of the 3 bytes)
the starting x and y


set x set y to start
10000000
01000000
00100000
00010000
00001000
00000100
00000010
00000001
then do 
go to selected address "1"
load the first byte
first pixel is and with 10000000
x+1
then and with 01000000
x+1
then and with 00100000
x+1
then and with 00010000
y+1
x=stating x
first pixel is and with 00001000
x+1
then and with 00000100
x+1
then and with 00000010
x+1
then and with 00000001
next byte and from the start


for _ range 3: // 3 bytes
    i = addr of or
    for _ rage 2: // 2 rows
        for _ range 4: // 4 columns
            do AND with addr[i]
            i ++
            x ++
        y ++
